title: macropanax undulatus
intro: Macropanax undulatus, also known as Tian Qi or Tianma, is a type of plant that belongs to the Arialaceae family and is native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Macropanax undulatus include improved cardiovascular health, reduced inflammation, and enhanced immune function. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs to treat various health conditions.
